# Tools — infra
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED — do not edit directly -->
<!-- Regenerate: generate-tool-context -->

## AWS Tools
- **aws** — AWS CLI — manage AWS resources, services, and credentials from the terminal
- **aws-sso-util** — Utilities for AWS SSO — simplifies login and credential management for SSO-based AWS accounts

## Kubernetes Tools
- **k9s** — Terminal UI for Kubernetes — real-time cluster monitoring and management
- **kubectx** — Fast Kubernetes context and namespace switcher
- **kubectl** — Kubernetes CLI — manage clusters, deployments, pods, and services

## Terraform Tools
- **tfenv** — Terraform version manager — install and switch between Terraform versions
- **terraform-docs** — Generate documentation from Terraform module inputs and outputs
